behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all files (commands.ts, tab.ts, tools.ts, snapshot.ts, evaluate.ts, form.ts, screenshot.ts, verify.ts, SKILL.md), the regex pattern ^(f\d+)?e\d+$, parameter names (target, startElement, endElement, selector, startSelector, endSelector), error message 'does not match any elements', and schema specifics like z.string().optional() with 'CSS or role selector'.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to change (parameter names, schema additions) but doesn't provide literal code; agent must still implement asRef helper, modify methods, and write SKILL.md content.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_cli_commands_use_target_param asserts NOT clickHasRef but click's toolParams could legitimately still reference 'ref' field when spreading; also test_drag_uses_start_end_element regex-scans only args section which is OK, but test_asref_function_classifies_inputs tests an inline reimplementation rather than importing, so not unique-guard issue — however tests rely on specific substrings like 'element:' in evaluate command which is gold-specific naming.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most tests (test_cli_commands_use_target_param, test_drag_uses_start_end_element, test_tab_reflocator_accepts_selector, test_tool_schemas_include_selector) are fs.readFileSync + substring/regex checks rather than importing and calling the actual code; test_asref_function_classifies_inputs re-implements the helper inline rather than importing it.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require specific substrings to be present/absent in specific files which a no-op stub would not satisfy; agent must actually modify the files.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover classification helper semantics, CLI param renames, drag params, tab.ts refLocator, schema selector fields, and filteredTools stripping as required by instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment headers ('Gates', 'Fail-to-pass') and have descriptive docstrings per test.

structured_data_schema.reason: No JSON/CSV/API output schema; output is code changes.

no_typos.reason: File paths and identifiers (refLocator, refLocators, startElement, endElement, filteredTools) are consistent across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction cites module files appropriate for the domain task scope without pointing to specific line numbers.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd-edits config task.
